Iteration: 1 - Update Order Status (PATCH)
Request Description
State machine enforced: order: IN_PROCESSING→ACCEPTED/CANCELED/REJECTED delivery: IN_PROCESSING→IN_PROGRESS/CANCELED/REJECTED payment: WAITING→PAID Canceled/Rejected restores stock atomically.
Request Information
Request Method: PATCH
Request URL: http://localhost:8000/api/v1/orders//
Response Information
Response Code: -
Mean time per request: 0ms
Mean size per request: 0B
Test Pass Percentage
50 %

Header NameHeader Value
Content-Type application/json
Authorization Bearer

Host localhost:8000
Accept-Encoding gzip, deflate, br
Connection keep-alive
Request Body
{
          "order_status": "ACCEPTED",
          "delivery_status": "IN_PROGRESS",
          "payment_status": "PAID"
        }
Response Headers
Response Body
No Response Body for this request

Iteration: 1 - Employee Login
Request Description
Returns UUID token (not JWT). Brute-force protection: 10 attempts/hour per username. Timing-attack safe: always runs check_password even on unknown user.
